calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker, via Zoom, for the San Francisco Public Administrator's Office, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges and waives any defect in notice of this matter. Counsel offers brief testimony regarding Ruth Brill's position regarding this matter. The court asks if anyone is appearing to object to the petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated May-07-1978 is admitted to probate. The San Francisco Public Administrator is appointed as Administrator with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-22-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.
